content.en:
Ye Tian captured the Void Sparrow, so he was very careful along the way.

Other than that.

Ye Tian also dispatched two will clones to cover in the middle of the road, ensuring the safety of the dragon crow's copy body and the Void Sparrow.

Soon, the Void Sparrow officially arrived in Ye Tian's hands.

Subsequently, Ye Tian walked out of the Extreme Dao Source Sea, then out of the Extreme Dao Mountain, and returned to the Wudao Tower, and then he breathed a sigh of relief.

"The Void Sparrow has arrived!"

Ye Tian was extremely excited.

By copying the talent, he could clearly sense that the Void Sparrow had already given birth to that talent.

Now, he can detect this talent, but unfortunately he still can't copy it.

【Extreme Dao Ancestral Fu: Underworld】

"Above the perfect-level ancestral endowment is the Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowment, but unfortunately it can't be copied! It can only depend on luck, I hope that in the future, I can find a treasure that can make the replication talent evolve again." Anyway, now that he has used the copying talent to record the mark of this extreme Dao ancestor, after the copying talent is promoted in the future, he can directly copy it. "

Ye Tian muttered.

Subsequently, he prepared to use the Extreme Path Soul Devouring Technique to devour this Void Sparrow.

Although the benefits of letting the Void Sparrow grow up and devour it before devouring it will definitely be more, but at that time, he will not be able to defeat the Void Sparrow.

So, it's a pity, it's a pity, swallowing is the king.

"Void Sparrow, I'm sorry!"

Ye Tian immediately ran the Extreme Dao Life Devouring Technique, swallowed the Extreme Dao Prison directly, and began to refine.

Rumble!!!!

The power of the Void Sparrow was absorbed by Ye Tian little by little, although the Void Sparrow was extremely resistant, but it could not compete with Ye Tian's Extreme Dao Life Devouring Technique.

As time passed, the Void Sparrow gradually gave up resistance.

After a long time, the Void Sparrow was completely devoured by Ye Tian.

At the same time, Ye Tian's life level, potential, and physical qualifications had all been improved in an extremely terrifying way, and even his Extreme Dao Body had skyrocketed significantly.

"It's a pity that I can't inherit the Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowment of the Void Sparrow!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

After devouring the Void Sparrow, Ye Tian found that the effect of his comprehension of the power of the Extreme Dao had increased many times, and the current comprehension effect was even better than that of the Void Sparrow Egg.

"Swallowing the Void Sparrow this time, there are too many benefits!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

And at this moment, he actually sensed the chains in the depths of the extreme body.

These chains are not chains of the Extreme, but chains of Extreme Power.

"This is the Pole Chain!!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

He hadn't been able to perceive these Extreme Chains before, but now he did.

"It is said that the super perfect controller can only perceive the existence of the Extreme Dao Chain when he cultivates to the extreme, but I didn't expect that I created a half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Realm, and actually perceived the Extreme Dao Chain, could it be that after I swallowed the Void Pyreck, I can be regarded as an Extreme Life, so I can see the Extreme Chain?"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

He tried to shake the Extreme Chain, but none of the Extreme Chain could be shaken, and it couldn't be broken at all.

"Sure enough, the half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Realm wants to break the chain of the Extreme Dao, that is thinking too much. Even those who are super-perfect in control have spent countless years unable to break a chain of the Extreme Dao. It is said that as long as you break an Extreme Dao chain, you will be qualified to attack the perfect controller of the Void Realm!" Ye Tian said darkly.

After devouring the Void Sparrow this time, Ye Tian's current strength was very close to that of a super-perfect controller.

If he went to the realm of the perfect controller now, once he succeeded in breaking through, his combat power would directly increase to a level comparable to that of a super perfect master.

But Ye Tian no longer looks down on a mere super-perfect controller, so naturally he won't attack the perfect controller now in order to immediately have the combat power of a super-perfect controller.

After turning into an Extreme Dao life, it will be easier for Ye Tian to comprehend the Extreme Dao, and if he is enlightened in the Extreme Dao Mountain, the effect will naturally be better.

With his current understanding, it would not take much time to comprehend a kind of extreme path.

However, Ye Tian also found that the help of Jidao Mountain to himself was getting smaller and smaller, even at the top of Jidao Mountain, the effect was not too good.

After all, the help of Jidao Mountain is limited, and it is impossible to stack it infinitely.

At this moment, Ye Tian was still worried about a problem, that is, the next time the Extreme Dao List was opened, it would expose the Extreme Dao that he had comprehended.

If the other Perfect Masters knew that he was just a half-step Perfection Controller of the Extreme Realm who had comprehended so many Extreme Paths at once, then there would be a problem, and even the Extreme Realm Perfect Controller would make a move on him.

Of course, after Ye Tian inquired, he didn't have to worry.

Because as long as the Extreme Dao List is opened, if you don't enter the Space-Time Ancestral Realm, you won't enter the Extreme Dao List.

In the past, there was a super-perfect controller who was sealed by the enemy and could not enter the space-time ancestral realm, so he was removed from the Extreme Dao List.

Therefore, as long as he does not enter the space-time ancestral realm in the future, although he will lose a lot of cultivation time, Ye Tian no longer cares.

For him, the current time spent practicing in the Extreme Dao Mountain was enough for him to comprehend a large number of Extreme Paths, and there was no need to add any more time at all.

When Ye Tian was cultivating in Extreme Dao Mountain, he also sent a clone to look for perfect-level ancestral endowments everywhere, striving to copy all the perfect-level ancestral endowments involved in the three thousand Dao.

Of course, he is mainly looking for a life with the Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowment, or a treasure that can be upgraded by the Copying Talent.

There is little hope, but you have to try!

And with his strength, there is almost no great danger in searching for it in the end of the realm, and his speed is also extremely fast, he can easily cross long distances, and it is very convenient to hurry.

In this way, as the years passed, Ye Tian's perfect-level ancestral endowment was more and more, so much that Ye Tiandu was dumbfounded, but he didn't dislike it either, as long as he saw it, he directly copied and fused it to become his perfect-level ancestral endowment.

It's a pity that he didn't find the Extreme Dao Ancestor Fu anymore, nor did he find the treasure that upgraded the copying talent.

But Ye Tian firmly believes that it can be found, it is only a matter of time.

Before you know it, tens of millions of eternal years have passed.

At this time, Ye Tian had already comprehended the power of a thousand extreme paths, if others knew this number, they would never believe it, but he did comprehend so many extreme paths.

Nowadays, it is no longer possible to improve any strength by revisiting the Extreme Dao, because these Extreme Paths are only quantitative and cannot cause qualitative changes.

But Ye Tianshen realized so much Extreme Dao power, just to condense the Endless Extreme Dao and accumulate the foundation.

If he condensed the Endless Extreme Dao, he could cause a qualitative change in the body of the Extreme Dao.

this day.

The Pole List is about to appear again.

Many perfect controllers were very curious about Ye Tian's comprehension of several extreme paths, but Ye Tian quietly left the space-time ancestral realm.

Soon, the Pole List was announced.

As one ranking after another was announced, many perfect controllers found that there was no Ye Tian's name among them at all.

Suddenly, everyone was shocked.
